synopsis: The SJC, pursuant to citation by the 50th General Assembly under BCO 40-5, found that Northwest Georgia Presbytery erred egregiously in approving calls and installing three candidates as associate pastors through a constitutionally deficient election process (slate voting, standing vote, failure to record number of voters present). The SJC stayed all further proceedings and declined to annul the installations, finding no PCA precedent for such relief.
